milestones.description: matrix LR 0.04 retest with lower momentum - new best!
constant weight decay (no schedule) - new best!
WD only in last 25% of training

experiments.description: aspect_ratio 96, 94M params - wider model worse, fewer tokens
batch 2^14 warmdown 0.3 - smaller batch less stable
5% warmup - worse, model handles full LR fine
weight decay 0.0 - too little, slightly worse
depth 10, 86M params - too big, fewer tokens
disable VE - optimizer crash (VE params have no grad)
device batch 32 - worse, larger micro-batch doesn't help
x0_lambda init 0.0 - worse, skip connection helps
final LR frac 0.1 - worse, going to 0 is better
MLP ratio 2x - worse, 4x better despite fewer tokens
muon beta2 0.9 - close but worse than 0.95
aspect 48, 33M params - too small despite more tokens
total batch 2^15 - worse, 2^16 better for Muon
flat momentum 0.85 - basically same as 0.88 ramp
matrix LR 0.04 retest with lower momentum - new best!
matrix LR 0.045 with lower momentum - worse
scalar LR 0.25 with lower momentum - worse
weight decay 0.03 - close but worse than 0.05
constant weight decay (no schedule) - new best!
WD=0.07 with const momentum - worse, 0.06 still optimal
MATRIX_LR=0.035 with const momentum - worse, 0.04 optimal
ADAM beta1=0.75 - close but worse, 0.8 optimal
grad clip 1.0 - much worse, no clipping better
standard WD - worse, cautious WD better
weight tying single update - terrible, double update better
WD=0.055 with tying - close but worse, 0.06 optimal
cosine warmdown - close but worse, linear optimal
WARMDOWN=0.4 with tying - close but worse, 0.5 optimal
x0 beta1=0.90 - close but worse, 0.96 optimal
